title: Help & Training
subtitle: Guides and documentation for using ZENITH

import.title: Product Database Import
import.description: ZENITH allows you to massively import your products from CSV or Excel (XLSX/XLS) files.

columns.title: File Columns
columns.required_details: You must provide at least the **Name** and one of the two **Prices** (Purchase or Sale).

logic.title: Import Logic
logic.tva: If VAT is not specified, it is calculated automatically: 0% if a public price exists, 19.25% if the public price is 0.
logic.update: If a product already exists (same CIP or same Name), it will be updated. Otherwise, it will be created.
logic.delimiter: The system automatically detects if you use semicolon (;) or comma (,) in your CSV files.

billing.title: Billing Management
billing.description: The billing module is designed for maximum productivity with the 'Zero Mouse' concept (Everything by keyboard).

qty_shortcut.title: Quick Quantity Shortcut
qty_shortcut.description: In the search bar, type '*' followed by a number (e.g., *5) to instantly change the quantity of the last added product.

navigation.title: Cart Navigation
navigation.description: Use arrow keys ↑↓ to select a line, '+' and '-' to adjust quantity, and 'Delete' to remove the item.

search.title: Smart Search
search.description: The system searches simultaneously by Name, CIP Code or Barcode. Scanning is automatic.

step1.title: Step 1: Open Sale
step1.description: Access the 'Billing' menu. The ZENITH interface is clean to allow you to focus on what matters.

step2.title: Step 2: Search for a Product
step2.description: Use the 'Product Search' field (F2). Type the name or scan directly. ZENITH displays stocks in real-time.

step3.title: Step 3: Manage Cart
step3.description: Once added, adjust quantities. The system automatically separates what the patient must pay.
